title: Design Add and Search Words Data Structure
coreIdea: Extend a standard trie to support search queries containing '.' as a wildcard matching any single character, by branching into all children during DFS whenever a wildcard is encountered instead of following a single path.
recognitionCues: trie-based design problem with wildcard character support in search
search complexity can no longer be purely O(word length) due to branching
approach: Use a standard trie for insertion. For search, run DFS: at each character, if it's a normal letter, follow that single child if it exists; if it's a wildcard '.', recursively try all existing children at that node. Return true if any path reaches a node marked end-of-word at the final character.
timeComplexity: O(L) for insert, O(26^L) worst case for search with many wildcards
